title: Market Inches Higher as Bulls Hold the Line - FinancialEDGE
description: This week, the Nigerian Exchange closed on a positive note following share price appreciation in NCR (+45.34%) and SCOA (+45.37%). As a result, the benchmark Nigerian Exchange All-Share Index (NGX-ASI) rose by 2.36% this week to settle at 162,129.48 points. Year to date returns closed at 6.76%, while market capitalization closed at ₦106.35trillion.
html:
This week, the Nigerian Exchange closed on a positive note following share price appreciation in NCR (+45.34%) and SCOA (+45.37%).

As a result, the benchmark Nigerian Exchange All-Share Index (NGX-ASI) rose by 2.36% this week to settle at 162,129.48 points.

Year to date returns closed at 6.76%, while market capitalization closed at ₦106.35trillion.
